title: WordPress adapter configuration
description: Configuration accepted by `createWordPressAdapter`. Validated at `precheck` and `init`; failures throw `WordPressAdapterError(code: 'config_invalid')`.

baseUrl.description: Base URL of the WordPress site, including protocol. The REST root is derived as `${baseUrl}/wp-json/wp/v2`.

auth.description: Optional authentication. Omit for public read-only sites. Strings are sent as `Authorization: Bearer <token>` (JWT plugins). For WordPress application passwords, use the `{ user, appPassword }` form (sent as HTTP Basic Auth). Either field accepts `{ from_env: NAME }` to read from a process env var.

include.description: Which WordPress collections to enumerate. Defaults: posts=true, pages=true, categories=true, tags=false, users=false.

perPage.description: REST page size. WordPress's hard cap is 100; defaults to 100 for fewest round-trips.

namespace.description: Prefix for emitted node ids. Default 'wp'.

i18n.description: i18n configuration. By default the adapter auto-detects Polylang or WPML from response payloads.

typeMap.description: Override the default ACT `type` for a WordPress collection. Keys: 'post', 'page', 'category', 'tag', 'user'.
